Oslo / London — Est. 2021

Independent
Publisher
& Label

We collaborate with painters, illustrators,
and installation artists to produce
limited-edition artist books and parallel
music releases. Each publication
is a singular art object.

01 / 06
About

Works
that
remain.

Vær — Norwegian for weather — was founded on the belief that the most meaningful art resists easy categorisation. We work slowly, in close collaboration with artists whose practice spans the boundary between the visual and the sonic.

Each publication is produced in limited editions of 300–500 copies, printed on uncoated stock, bound by hand. Our releases are distributed through independent bookshops and record stores across Northern Europe and the UK.

The label and the press are not separate operations — they are two expressions of the same impulse: to make things that slow you down.

Vær Records

Music for
slow attention.

Each record released on Vær is conceived in dialogue with a visual artist. The music is not a soundtrack — it is a parallel work, sharing material, duration, and intention with the publication it accompanies.

Format 12″ / 33⅓ RPM
Edition 300 copies
Catalogue VR001 — VR004
Distribution Oslo / London / Berlin
